mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM TBMSGLAYOUTBS WHERE 1=1
AND MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')

SELECT * FROM( SELECT MSG_NM AS msgNm ,MSG_NM_SUB AS msgNmSub ,MSG_VERSION AS msgVersion ,MSG_DSCD AS msgDscd ,REG_MAN_ID AS regManId ,REG_DTTM AS regDttm ,MSG_DATA_VAL AS msgDataVal ,MSG_DESC AS msgDesc ,EXTRNL_BIZ_NM AS extrnlBizNm ,DTO_NM AS dtoNm ,MSG_LAYOUT_ID AS msgLayoutId ,APP_TYPE_CD AS appTypeCd ,TRX_CD AS trxCd ,APP_NM AS appNm ,LV_1_CD AS lv1Cd ,LV_2_CD AS lv2Cd ,LV_3_CD AS lv3Cd ,LV_4_CD AS lv4Cd ,LV_5_CD AS lv5Cd ,TRX_DSCD AS trxDscd ,BIT_MAP_CRTN_YN AS bitMapCrtnYn ,JOB_ID AS jobId ,CHL_DSCD AS chlDscd ,ISO8583_DATA_TYPE_CD AS iso8583DataTypeCd ,CRTN_SEQ AS crtnSeq ,RSRV_FLD_VAL1 AS rsrvFldVal1 ,RSRV_FLD_VAL2 AS rsrvFldVal2 ,RSRV_FLD_VAL3 AS rsrvFldVal3 ,BIT_MAP_TYPE_CD AS bitMapTypeCd ,WORK_STATUS_CD AS workStatusCd ,CUST_API_YN AS custApiYn ,MSG_RVS_NO AS msgRvsNo ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBMSGLAYOUTBS WHERE 1=1
AND MSG_NM like CONCAT('%',#{msgNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_NM_SUB like CONCAT('%',#{msgNmSub, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_VERSION like CONCAT('%',#{msgVersion, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND MSG_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{msgDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND REG_MAN_ID like CONCAT('%',#{regManId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND REG_DTTM like CONCAT('%',#{regDttm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_DATA_VAL like CONCAT('%',#{msgDataVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{msgDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND EXTRNL_BIZ_NM like CONCAT('%',#{extrnlBizNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DTO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{dtoNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND APP_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{appTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND TRX_CD like CONCAT('%',#{trxCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND APP_NM like CONCAT('%',#{appNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_1_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv1Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_2_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv2Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_3_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv3Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_4_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv4Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_5_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv5Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND TRX_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND BIT_MAP_CRTN_YN like CONCAT('%',#{bitMapCrtnYn, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND JOB_ID like CONCAT('%',#{jobId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND CHL_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{chlDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ISO8583_DATA_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{iso8583DataTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND CRTN_SEQ like CONCAT('%',#{crtnSeq, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND RSRV_FLD_VAL1 like CONCAT('%',#{rsrvFldVal1, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND RSRV_FLD_VAL2 like CONCAT('%',#{rsrvFldVal2, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND RSRV_FLD_VAL3 like CONCAT('%',#{rsrvFldVal3, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND BIT_MAP_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{bitMapTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND WORK_STATUS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{workStatusCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND CUST_API_YN like CONCAT('%',#{custApiYn, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_RVS_NO like CONCAT('%',#{msgRvsNo, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
order by REG_DTTM desc ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBMSGLAYOUTBS WHERE 1=1
AND MSG_NM like CONCAT('%',#{msgNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_VERSION like CONCAT('%',#{msgVersion, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND MSG_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{msgDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND REG_MAN_ID like CONCAT('%',#{regManId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND REG_DTTM like CONCAT('%',#{regDttm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_DATA_VAL like CONCAT('%',#{msgDataVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{msgDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND EXTRNL_BIZ_NM like CONCAT('%',#{extrnlBizNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DTO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{dtoNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND APP_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{appTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND TRX_CD like CONCAT('%',#{trxCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND APP_NM like CONCAT('%',#{appNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_1_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv1Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_2_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv2Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_3_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv3Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_4_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv4Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_5_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv5Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND TRX_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND BIT_MAP_CRTN_YN like CONCAT('%',#{bitMapCrtnYn, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND JOB_ID like CONCAT('%',#{jobId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND CHL_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{chlDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ISO8583_DATA_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{iso8583DataTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND CRTN_SEQ like CONCAT('%',#{crtnSeq, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND RSRV_FLD_VAL1 like CONCAT('%',#{rsrvFldVal1, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND RSRV_FLD_VAL2 like CONCAT('%',#{rsrvFldVal2, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND RSRV_FLD_VAL3 like CONCAT('%',#{rsrvFldVal3, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND BIT_MAP_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{bitMapTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND WORK_STATUS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{workStatusCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND CUST_API_YN like CONCAT('%',#{custApiYn, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_RVS_NO like CONCAT('%',#{msgRvsNo, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')

SELECT MSG_NM AS msgNm ,MSG_NM_SUB AS msgNmSub ,MSG_VERSION AS msgVersion ,MSG_DSCD AS msgDscd ,REG_MAN_ID AS regManId ,REG_DTTM AS regDttm ,MSG_DATA_VAL AS msgDataVal ,MSG_DESC AS msgDesc ,EXTRNL_BIZ_NM AS extrnlBizNm ,DTO_NM AS dtoNm ,MSG_LAYOUT_ID AS msgLayoutId ,APP_TYPE_CD AS appTypeCd ,TRX_CD AS trxCd ,APP_NM AS appNm ,LV_1_CD AS lv1Cd ,LV_2_CD AS lv2Cd ,LV_3_CD AS lv3Cd ,LV_4_CD AS lv4Cd ,LV_5_CD AS lv5Cd ,TRX_DSCD AS trxDscd ,BIT_MAP_CRTN_YN AS bitMapCrtnYn ,JOB_ID AS jobId ,CHL_DSCD AS chlDscd ,ISO8583_DATA_TYPE_CD AS iso8583DataTypeCd ,CRTN_SEQ AS crtnSeq ,RSRV_FLD_VAL1 AS rsrvFldVal1 ,RSRV_FLD_VAL2 AS rsrvFldVal2 ,RSRV_FLD_VAL3 AS rsrvFldVal3 ,BIT_MAP_TYPE_CD AS bitMapTypeCd ,SHARED_YN AS sharedYn ,WORK_STATUS_CD AS workStatusCd ,CUST_API_YN AS custApiYn ,MSG_RVS_NO AS msgRvsNo FROM TBMSGLAYOUTBS WHERE MSG_LAYOUT_ID = #{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBMSGLAYOUTBS WHERE MSG_LAYOUT_ID = #{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT C.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId, C.INTRFC_NM AS intrfcNm, C.INTRFC_TYPE_CD AS intrfcType, A.MSG_LAYOUT_ID AS msgLayoutId FROM TBINTRFCMSGLAYOUTDT A INNER JOIN TBMSGLAYOUTBS B ON A.MSG_LAYOUT_ID = B.MSG_LAYOUT_ID INNER JOIN TBINTRFCCOMBS C ON A.INTRFC_ID = C.INTRFC_ID WHERE B.MSG_LAYOUT_ID = #{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND C.INTRFC_ID like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND C.INTRFC_NM like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
GROUP BY C.INTRFC_ID, C.INTRFC_NM, C.INTRFC_TYPE_CD, A.MSG_LAYOUT_ID

SELECT * FROM( SELECT MSG_NM AS msgNm ,MSG_NM_SUB AS msgNmSub ,MSG_VERSION AS msgVersion ,MSG_DSCD AS msgDscd ,REG_MAN_ID AS regManId ,REG_DTTM AS regDttm ,MSG_DATA_VAL AS msgDataVal ,MSG_DESC AS msgDesc ,EXTRNL_BIZ_NM AS extrnlBizNm ,DTO_NM AS dtoNm ,MSG_LAYOUT_ID AS msgLayoutId ,APP_TYPE_CD AS appTypeCd ,TRX_CD AS trxCd ,APP_NM AS appNm ,LV_1_CD AS lv1Cd ,LV_2_CD AS lv2Cd ,LV_3_CD AS lv3Cd ,LV_4_CD AS lv4Cd ,LV_5_CD AS lv5Cd ,TRX_DSCD AS trxDscd ,BIT_MAP_CRTN_YN AS bitMapCrtnYn ,JOB_ID AS jobId ,CHL_DSCD AS chlDscd ,ISO8583_DATA_TYPE_CD AS iso8583DataTypeCd ,CRTN_SEQ AS crtnSeq ,RSRV_FLD_VAL1 AS rsrvFldVal1 ,RSRV_FLD_VAL2 AS rsrvFldVal2 ,RSRV_FLD_VAL3 AS rsrvFldVal3 ,BIT_MAP_TYPE_CD AS bitMapTypeCd ,ROW_NUMBER() over (order by REG_DTTM desc) as rn FROM TBMSGLAYOUTBS WHERE 1=1 AND CHL_DSCD = 'EXTERNAL'
AND REG_MAN_ID like CONCAT('%',#{regManId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_DATA_VAL like CONCAT('%',#{msgDataVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND EXTRNL_BIZ_NM like CONCAT('%',#{extrnlBizNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND TRX_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
) p WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBMSGLAYOUTBS WHERE 1=1 AND CHL_DSCD = 'EXTERNAL'
AND REG_MAN_ID like CONCAT('%',#{regManId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_DATA_VAL like CONCAT('%',#{msgDataVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND EXTRNL_BIZ_NM like CONCAT('%',#{extrnlBizNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND TRX_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')

select MSG_LAYOUT_ID from TBMSGLAYOUTBS where MSG_DATA_VAL = #{msgDataVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and CHL_DSCD='INTERNAL'
and MSG_LAYOUT_ID not in(#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR})

select MSG_LAYOUT_ID from TBMSGLAYOUTBS where MSG_DATA_VAL = #{msgDataVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and CHL_DSCD='INTERNAL'
and MSG_LAYOUT_ID not in(#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR})
and MSG_DSCD not in ('IV')

select MSG_LAYOUT_ID from TBMSGLAYOUTBS where DTO_NM = #{dtoNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and CHL_DSCD='EXTERNAL'
and MSG_LAYOUT_ID not in(#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR})
